summary: Script follows solid bash practices (set -euo pipefail, error handling, extglob matching) but deliverable is incomplete. Missing label-rules.conf file required by workflow and referenced in script—no template or example provided. Integration test (lines 92-114) has fragile coupling to rules format; will break if rules change. Workflow references non-existent test file path tests/pr-label-assigner.bats. Cannot validate with act or verify end-to-end behavior without rules file. Workflow file input handling (line 62) uses fragile escaped-newline conversion.
